case_title: MICHAEL C. RIGHETTI VS. LISA ALLEE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (NO FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED SEP-27-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEE, LISA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIGHETTI, MICHAEL C. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLEE, LISA DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $0 FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.00 FILED BY RIGHETTI, MICHAEL C. AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEE, LISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL RIGHETTI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LISA ALLEE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
